message: Jake
Ginny
Tonny
What a surprise to see you back once in a while.
I’m sorry, it’s not a lovely boy.
What!?
Is it you again?

It reflects the owner's taste, unified with quite expensive furnishings, not a single cheap gold-plated product in sight.
In debt up to their necks,
this room is way too luxurious. Was this room the cause of the debt?
It’s a gorgeous room surrounded by windows on three sides, with a leather sofa, a grand piano, and a fur rug.
There’s no end to it.
Still maintaining his arrogant attitude. Does this man ever yield to others?
He has a stern expression typical of a writer, with wrinkles carved into his forehead. Does one’s profession shape a person, or do people change themselves?
It seems you haven't done any drugs today. Your attitude and expression look perfectly normal.
I met a boy named Anju.
And that.
What does that even mean?
He asked me to pass on a message. He said to come and play again.
A-Ah, so Anju.
Would say something like that?
I didn't know you were bisexual.
Hmph.
That's not so rare these days. It won't serve as blackmail!
I have no intention of blackmailing you at all. Are you just paranoid?
Tch.
You should probably stop acting tough. Sure, your reputation is pretty bad,
but adding one more won't change anything.
That's not how it works, is it?
Get out! I don't want to see your face!
It won't go so conveniently for you. It's not me who’s cornered, right?
What do you want?
Spit it out.
What do you want?
Spit it out.
If you're done, hurry up and leave.
Hey, do you find it that fun to bully me?
Anju is a sweet boy who heals my heart.
But it seems you haven't met him recently? Is there a reason?
Anju is cute, but he can be quite expensive, you know. I was thinking of choosing over him.
I met him after.
the last time I saw him.
I intended to say goodbye.
But I couldn't say anything when I saw his eyes.
Is that so?
That's why I was avoiding him.
Anju
It will only hurt more if we meet again.
I'm sorry, but I really
don't know anything about her. It would be wrong to focus on just me when she had other partners.
Who are the other partners?
That's something I can't say.
I'm worried about her too. But there's nothing I can do; I don't know what to do.
I was just framed by Gordon!
Alright, I'll tell you everything.
Is that true!?
I was framed by Gordon.
Gordon, the owner of the Kasbah?
Ever since I got involved with that man, my life began to spiral down, you know?
I am
I don’t know anything.
Back when I was still passionate about the stage, I met Gordon through Gabriela.
I started buying drugs from him and slowly got closer to him. That sounds weird, doesn’t it?
One day, he asked me to direct something. It was a video.
The video direction
Is that it?
Yeah. But it was a trap. It turned out to be a snuff video, and instead of directing, I was forced to hold a scalpel.
A snuff video, as in one that films actual murders?
That's right. My face was clearly shown, and what I thought was a doll was actually a living human.
That was
Then, it became
first, extortion, and then it moved on to dealing drugs and so on.
I was destroyed because of that man.
A guy named Miles at Gordon's place ransacked my office.
No, I'm sorry. That was my doing.
I've heard that from him. Does that have anything to do with being framed by Gordon?
I was trying to get the scalpel back.
It was a scalpel I couldn't throw away even if I wanted to.
There must have been a gap in my defenses.
That guy was originally one of Gordon’s underlings. But, when I kept an eye on him, he listened to me.
But the office break-in was pretty severe.
I'm sorry. I’m really sorry. He was the one who.
Didn't he do more harm than necessary?
I heard he's trying to be an actor despite everything. That's probably why he listened to me.
Are you still planning to play dumb, or are you going to come clean about the rough truth?
I really can't verify that.
He might just be a foolish guy who's gotten lost in the show business world.
That’s a clever escape line. Even if Gordon is truly the root of all evil.
It was me who jumped at the bait thinking it was a delicious deal.
There's no need for sympathy.
There might be nothing more.
to poke into, it might not yield anything. In that case, I have to check on Gordon.
Owner of the Kasbah, Gordon.
I thought he was a shady character, but I can’t figure out what he's doing behind the scenes.
Not just drugs and women, but he was even into the snuff video business. Seems he’s not just your average thug.
He said he met Gabriela for the first time through her. Could it be that lady is in on it too?
Was the office break-in and the threats against me all due to.
his instigation?
So he was a low-quality thug who handled that kind of rough work professionally.
They probably aren't important enough to take on murder contracts.
Sorry for the intrusion.
Ah.
